title: Lead SEO Specialist at Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ustraa Consulting Pvt Ltd!
